# hrobot_servers (Data Source)

List all Hetzner Robot dedicated servers on the account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hrobot_servers" "all" {}

output "server_names" {
  value = [for s in data.hrobot_servers.all.servers : s.server_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `servers` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers))

<a id="nestedatt--servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers`

Read-Only:

- `cancelled` (Boolean)
- `dc` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `ips` (List of String)
- `paid_until` (String)
- `product` (String)
- `server_ip` (String)
- `server_name` (String)
- `status` (String)
